D6 Display L5 Evaluate Reference

ICC & the Profile Connection Space

connect every camera, screen, and printer to one neutral hub and you need N profiles — not the N² direct conversions a hubless world demands

Windows ICM and every ICC system route colour through a device-independent Profile Connection Space (CIE XYZ or Lab). Each device needs just one profile mapping it to and from the PCS. Without that hub, converting between any two devices would need a bespoke transform for every pair — and the count explodes as devices multiply.

Add devices and toggle the PCS hub. With it, the profile count grows in a straight line; without it, the tangle of direct conversions grows as the square. That linear scaling is why the PCS exists.
